UNITED NATTONS - ORGANTSATION DES NATTONS UNIES

CERTIFICATE OF REGISTRATION

No: 31057

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS hereby certifies that the following international agreement nas oeeR rea srerea withtnnensecreranan

mn accordaie vitY

Article 102 of the Charter of

the United Nations:

CERTIFICAT d ENREGISTREMENT

Le SECRETAIRE GENERAL de 1 ORGANISATION des NATIONS UNIES certite par la presente que . accord international indique ci-aprés été enregistré au Secrétartat,

conformément a

L'Article 102 de la Charte des Nattons Unies :

No. 22837 FRANCE AND MONACO:

corvent ton on rebruary 1955901al security. Signed at Paris on 28
